title: MikroTik SXTR&R11e-LTE7, SXT LTE7 kit, RouterOS L3
description: The MikroTik SXT LTE7 kit is a durable outdoor LTE CPE , supplied together with the R11e-LTE7 modem . The modem supports 4G LTE (Cat. 7) and 3G networks, with speeds of up to 300Mbps downlink and 100Mbps uplink . It utilizes 2x2 MIMO on the downlink and carrier aggregation , which allows the simultaneous use of multiple LTE bands . This feature improves response times and connection stability in high-traffic areas and can enhance transmission efficiency in locations with weaker signal conditions The unit is equipped with (1) 10/100Mbps 802.3af/at PoE-In port and (1) 10/100Mbps passive PoE-Out port for connecting and powering an additional device, such as a security camera. The output voltage on the LAN2 port matches the input voltage Device Gbit PoE injector Power adapter 24V/1,2A Metal cable tie Pole-mount bracket Elastic thermal pad
